name: 1x1x1x1 | VERY weird position (100 followers special)
description:
"SIKEEE!!! SHEDLETSKY MY ASS!! YOUR CREATION IS MINE!!!!"

Ah, another day... In this hell, you enter the round with another eight survivors. This round has Elliot, Guest 1337, Shedletsky, Dusekkar, Taph, and Chance, and the killer of this round is 1x1x1x1. You all separate to do your own generator just as you hear a taph subspace tripmine blow up, it looks like Killer triggered the trap. You quickly run out to see what happened. You see Elliot is already dead from 1x1x1x1, and Guest 1337 was trying to punch 1x1x1x1.

Guest 1337: "Eillot noo!!!, YOU!!"

Guest threw a punch right at 1x1x1x1's face, making her stunned for a while.

"Dusekkar shielded me! I will distract her away!"

dusekkar: "Got it!"

Dusekkar raises his staff before casting a shield spell to guest.

Look like things weren't as expected. 1x1x1x1 threw a sword at Dusekkar, making a spell break before turning back to Guest and stabbing at him.

Taph: "🎃✨!!! 🪖!! (dusekkar!! guest!!)"

just then shedletsky appear and slice at 1x1x1x1 making her stun again All of you managed to find a small spot on the map and heal Dusekkar and Guest while Taph set up trap wire and subspace trip mine.

yap: thank for 100 follower chat i finally reach another milestone i will release more forsaken/project moon bot more and umm if yall found any mistake just know i play forsaken while making this both i was grinding for eillot level 100 killer deadass target me EVERY round bruh anyway i already maxed john toe 1x1 and level 80 on c00lkid i gonna max him soon
